## Example

```esql
FROM employees
| WHERE RANGE_INTERSECTS(hire_date, TO_DATE_RANGE("1985-02-01..1985-03-01"))
| KEEP emp_no, hire_date
| SORT emp_no
```


Find ranges that overlap a target window
